item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response brakes the N+1 repair immediately, refuses adding another entrance-page note, reframes the pattern as repeated downstream information overlays across nurse station/front desk/public account/entrance page, and moves upstream to a unified authoritative outpatient information owner with consolidation/replacement/deletion decisions. It does not supply the requested patch copy or implementation."}
